text: Light is both wave and particle — a photon is its mysterious packet. These tiny particles carry energy, zipping through space at incredible speeds. But wait. How can something be both a wave and a particle? It’s the wave-particle duality! When we observe photons, they behave like particles. Yet, when unobserved, they display their wave nature. Mind-blowing, right? Curious for more? Follow for your daily dose of science magic!
